description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house enclosed by a brick perimeter wall, featuring a spacious green lawn, a driveway leading to a two-car garage, and a backyard with a swimming pool. The house is constructed primarily of light-colored brick with a dark, multi-gabled roof and numerous large windows, especially prominent on the front and rear facades. The backyard includes a cluster of mature trees providing shade and privacy. The front entryway is accessible via a paved walkway and is flanked by symmetrical landscaping. The garage is attached to the side of the house, and the rear of the property offers ample open space for recreation. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on comfort and outdoor living.
description: A modern brick house with a dark gabled roof, large windows, attached garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and trees, all enclosed by a brick wall.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway, garage, and a large expanse of lawn within the brick-walled property.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, large windows, and a cluster of trees on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pool, open lawn, and the back of the house with a clear view of the garage and driveway.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway, paved walkway, symmetrical windows, and the attached garage to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved walkway, no porch, flanked by symmetrical windows and a simple overhang above the door
